==Biography==

== Trivia ==
* Her favorite champion is {{ci|Lux}}.
* She is a Event Planning Specialist for Garena Taiwan now.
* Hosts a talk show via [http://talk.garena.tw/ Garena Talk] called "Cola In" where she talks to viewers and occasionally has esports personalities on as guests.<ref>[http://lol.esport.garena.tw/news/news_info.php?nid=1276&category=3 <nowiki>【專訪】“ 搭給厚！挖係Colalin！”親切破百的聊聊主持人 – Colalin專訪</nowiki>] ''lol.esport.garena.tw''</ref>
